title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese describes using Claude Code to build a SaaS product that generated $481,000 annually, going from zero code to production with a non-technical team in 45 days. The video covers five steps for effective code generation: starting with the problem, knowing where to engineer versus use existing solutions, learning technical vocabulary instead of coding syntax, building methodically, and anticipating failure points.
